---
title: "About me"
toc: false
# No title-block banner = compact header; avoids the oversized hero
---

::::: columns
::: {.column width="65%"}
# Dr Olatunji Johnson

I'm a Senior Lecturer in Statistics (from 1 August 2026) in the Department of Mathematics at [**The University of Manchester**](https://www.manchester.ac.uk/)**.** I was formerly a post-doctoral researcher and PhD student at **CHICAS**, Lancaster Medical School, **Lancaster University** (UK). My PhD was supervised by **Prof. Peter Diggle**, **Prof. Emanuele Giorgi** and **Prof. Jo Knight**.

My research develops novel Model-based Geostatistical (MBG) methods to provide valuable answers to many global public health questions and support informed decision-making in low-resource settings. I have worked and currently working on
several global public health problems including COPD, malaria and neglected tropical diseases (NTDs) such as river blindness, soil-transmitted helminths, schistosomiasis, Trachoma, Loiasis.

[Download CV](files/cv.pdf){.btn .btn-primary .me-2} [View Publications](/publications/){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .me-2} [Email](mailto:olatunji.johnson@manchester.ac.uk){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}
:::

::: {.column width="35%"}
![](images/profile.jpg){.rounded-circle width="220" fig-align="center" style="box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.12);"}
:::
:::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## News

- **Jul 2026** — Promoted to **Senior Lecturer** in Statistics at The University
  of Manchester, effective 1 August 2026.
- **Jul 2026** — **SDALGCP2** (the successor to SDALGCP) and **MBGapp** are now
  on **CRAN**, and a new package, **spLeakage**, is available on
  [GitHub](https://github.com/olatunjijohnson/spLeakage). See the
  [Software](/software.html) page.
- **Mar 2026** — New preprint: *Decoupling Distance and Networks — Hybrid Graph
  Attention–Geostatistical Methods for Spatio-temporal Risk Mapping*. See
  [Publications](/publications/).
- **Feb 2026** — New paper on *disentangling spatial interference and spatial
  confounding biases in causal inference*.
- **Jan 2026** — Delivered the **Advanced Geostatistical Modelling** workshop at
  FUTA, Nigeria. [Materials here](https://olatunjijohnson.github.io/FUTA-workshop-2026/).
- **2025** — Released **ESPENAPI** (NTD data access) and **variogramApp** (now
  hosted online). See the [Software](/software.html) page.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Contact

**Email:** olatunji.johnson@manchester.ac.uk

**ORCID:** <https://orcid.org/0000-0002-4080-0999>

**Google Scholar:** <https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=gn9CZVYAAAAJ&hl=en>

**GitHub:** <https://github.com/olatunjijohnson>
